title: Harris Seriously Good Flat Artist Arts and Crafts Paint Brushes, 10 Pack
features: This Seriously Good paint brush set has been developed for painting detailed and intricate areas. Ideal for hobbies and crafts.
A specially developed blend of filaments mean these paint brushes can be used with all paints, including chalk paint.
This brush set has been designed for use when painting intricate detail on any artistic or craft project.
For best results rub brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier. PACK OF 10 FLAT BRUSHES FOR HOBBY & CRAFT PAINTING DETAIL Contents 10 x flat brushes FLAT BRUSHES IDEAL FOR HOBBY & CRAFT PAINTING Use for painting detail and intricate areas All the Seriously Good Flat Brushes you need for painting those detailed & intricate areas when doing those hobby & craft projects Suitable for use with all paints & varnishes Doing a Hobby & Craft Project Don't forget to team your Seriously Good Flat Paint Brushes with the Harris Seriously Good Fitch Brush pack, and Seriously Good Round Brush Pack Harris Seriously Good Flat Hobby & Craft Paint Brushes Harris Seriously Good Round Hobby & Craft Paint Brushes Harris Seriously Good Hobby & Craft Fitch Brush Pack Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 836 4.6 out of 5 stars 395 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,698 Price £2.27 £ 2 . 27 £5.60 £ 5 . 60 £5.24 £ 5 . 24 Painting detail & intricate areas ✓ ✓ ✓ Use with all paints & varnishes ✓ ✓ ✓ Painting precision ✓ ✓ ✓ Wooden Handle no data ✓ ✓ Brush type Flat Round Flat & Angled
